### Checklist
- [ ] `SKILL.md` contains valid YAML frontmatter
- [ ] At least one example added to `examples/`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or personal data
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] I understand my contribution is licensed under the [IDEALAB PARTNERS License](../LICENSE)
